elements.text: *Confidence:* High — vendor status page, active investigation

text.text:
*Current Issue*
Kaseya reports elevated latency affecting multiple Datto Workplace projects in the U.S. region, with R&D actively investigating.

fields.text:
*Impact*
Delayed file sync and project access for Datto Workplace users in the U.S.; likely ticket volume, user friction, and possible workflow disruption for MSP-served clients.

text.text:
*Response*
• Check Datto Workplace-heavy clients for sync/project access complaints and pause non-urgent escalations until vendor guidance changes.
• Advise affected users to avoid risky retries or bulk changes, document impact by client, and monitor Kaseya status for recovery updates.
